findings.title: Israeli forces send reinforcements Qalandiya refugee camp as raid continues
findings.summary:
Israeli forces send reinforcements Qalandiya refugee camp as raid continues

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli military has deployed more troops to Qalandiya refugee camp in the occupied West Bank, where a raid is ongoing after a Palestinian man opened fire on Israeli border police.

According to Al Jazeera, the police had entered the camp to conduct an operation to map an Unrwa building in Kafr Aqab.

Israeli soldiers reportedly shot the gunman, whose condition is currentl...

findings.title: Gaza death toll rises
findings.summary:
Gaza death toll rises

    
    

        
    
                The number of Palestinians killed by Israel in Gaza since October 2023 now stands at 72,740 people with another 172,192 people wounded, Wafa news agency is reporting citing medical sources. There are thousands more people missing and presumed dead under the rubble.

The sources reported that Gaza hospitals received the bodies of three people, along with 16 others who were wounded in the last 24 hours.

Since the so-called ceasefi...

findings.title: Interceptor missiles launched from Kiryat Shmona after drone alert
findings.summary:
Interceptor missiles launched from Kiryat Shmona after drone alert

    
    

        
    
                Israeli Channel 12 reported that two interceptor missiles were launched from Kiryat Shmona towards southern Lebanon after a suspicious aerial target was detected near the border area.

The incident came amid continuing cross-border tensions and military operations between Israel and Hezbollah.

The Israeli military later said it had intercepted a “suspicious aerial target” in the area ...

findings.title: Hezbollah using fibre optic drones to evade Israeli jamming
findings.summary:
Hezbollah using fibre optic drones to evade Israeli jamming

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli military is facing difficulties countering First Person View drones used by Hezbollah, according to a report by The Jerusalem Post.

The newspaper said Hezbollah has been using fibre optic threads tethered to the drones, allowing operators to guide them manually and avoid Israeli electronic jamming systems.

The report said Hezbollah recently released footage showing an FPV drone ...

findings.title: Israeli soldier killed in Hezbollah drone attack near Lebanon border
findings.summary:
Israeli soldier killed in Hezbollah drone attack near Lebanon border

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli military said a soldier was killed in a drone attack launched by Hezbollah towards the Manara area near the border with Lebanon on Sunday.

The death brings the number of Israeli soldiers killed since clashes between Hezbollah and Israel escalated at the beginning of March to 18, according to the army.

Israeli media reported that the military carried out airstrikes and a...

findings.title: Israel’s election may end the Netanyahu era but not the ‘forever wars’
findings.summary:
Israel’s next election campaign is well under way, with political defections, fractious coalition-building and naked appeals to ethnic exclusion marking its opening salvoes as a crowded field of challengers queues up to try Benjamin Netanyahu for the security catastrophe of October 7, 2023 and the wars that followed.
The vote, constitutionally set for this October, is shaping up as a referendum on the prime minister’s central claim to power: that only he can keep Israel safe.
But after two an...

findings.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
findings.summary: The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.
findings.text: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father | The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.

findings.title: 'There are no innocents in Gaza': Channel 14, the Israeli television channel accused of genocidal rhetoric
findings.summary: The channel, whose ratings have been steadily increasing, gives prominence to the most violent rhetoric, including calls for the 'annihilation' of the Palestinian territory. Three Israeli NGOs have compiled a detailed record of these statements, to which Le Monde has had access, and have filed a petition before the Supreme Court.
findings.text: 'There are no innocents in Gaza': Channel 14, the Israeli television channel accused of genocidal rhetoric | The channel, whose ratings have been steadily increasing, gives prominence to the most violent rhetoric, including calls for the 'annihilation' of the Palestinian territory. Three Israeli NGOs have compiled a detailed record of these statements, to which Le Monde has had access, and have filed a petition before the Supreme Court.

findings.title: Trotz Waffenruhe spitzt sich die humanitäre Lage in Gaza zu
findings.summary: Andauernder Beschuss, Hunderte Tote: Die Waffenruhe im Gaza-Krieg hat keinen Bestand. Der von Israel kontrollierte Teil wird immer größer - was die Not der Menschen vergrößert, die im übrigen Teil des Gazastreifens leben müssen. Von Julio Segador.

findings.summary: La invasión del sur del país árabe da luz a nuevos vídeos de ataques o burlas a símbolos cristianos, mientras el ejército “sigue investigando” un vídeo de 2024 que los militares grabaron con el rostro al descubierto

findings.title: Hizbullah'tan İsrail ordusuna misilleme: 40 ülke Hürmüz'e askeri müdahaleyi görüşecek
findings.summary: İsrail, ateşkes anlaşmasına rağmen Lübnan'a yönelik saldırılarına devam ediyor. Hizbullah güçleri, İsrail'in Lübnan'ın güney bölgelerine düzenlediği saldırılara patlayıcı yüklü İHA'larla karşılık verdi. Hizbullah saldırısında İsrail askerlerinin yaralandığı kaydedildi. İngiltere ve Fransa öncülüğünde bir araya gelecek yaklaşık 40 ülkenin, Hürmüz Boğazı'na askeri müdahale seçeneğini görüşeceği bildirildi.
findings.text: Hizbullah'tan İsrail ordusuna misilleme: 40 ülke Hürmüz'e askeri müdahaleyi görüşecek | İsrail, ateşkes anlaşmasına rağmen Lübnan'a yönelik saldırılarına devam ediyor. Hizbullah güçleri, İsrail'in Lübnan'ın güney bölgelerine düzenlediği saldırılara patlayıcı yüklü İHA'larla karşılık verdi. Hizbullah saldırısında İsrail askerlerinin yaralandığı kaydedildi. İngiltere ve Fransa öncülüğünde bir araya gelecek yaklaşık 40 ülkenin, Hürmüz Boğazı'na askeri müdahale seçeneğini görüşeceği bildirildi.

findings.title: Sauver le cessez-le-feu entre Israël et le Liban en composant avec ses limites
findings.summary: La trêve entre Israël et le Hezbollah, prolongée le 23 avril, ne tient qu’à un fil. Le mécanisme de surveillance mis en place pour le précédent cessez-le-feu pourrait aider à préserver l’actuel.

findings.title: To Salvage the Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Work within Its Limits
findings.summary: The truce between Israel and Hizbollah, extended on 23 April, is hanging by a thread. The monitoring mechanism established for the previous ceasefire could help preserve the current one.
findings.text: To Salvage the Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Work within Its Limits | The truce between Israel and Hizbollah, extended on 23 April, is hanging by a thread. The monitoring mechanism established for the previous ceasefire could help preserve the current one.

findings.title: If Trump wants out of war he needs to stand up to Israel on Lebanon
findings.summary: The Trump administration will host a new round of talks this week aimed at ending the latest warfare involving Israel and Lebanon.No new developments on the Lebanese front give reason for optimism that this round will yield an agreement that two prior rounds did not. The Trump administration, however, has an incentive to push for an agreement because of President Trump’s need to extract himself and the United States from the impasse involving the Strait of Hormuz. The last time Iran lifted it...
